mnemonics: Please Protect My Very Sensitive Data - for the IoT architecture layers: Perception, Processing/Network, Middleware, Application, Business
keyPoints: Security is paramount due to the scale and physical nature of devices.
Communication protocols are chosen based on power, range, and data rate requirements (e.g., LoRaWAN vs. Bluetooth).
Edge/Fog computing is used to reduce latency and bandwidth usage by processing data closer to the source.
commonMistakes: Assuming all IoT devices have high processing power and unlimited energy (ignoring constraints).
Confusing IoT communication protocols and their specific use-cases (e.g., using Zigbee for long-range applications).
